anomalies.detail: Bot offline 70+ days. trades.csv missing. 54th consecutive audit flag. Zero live revenue.
Win/loss ratio 0.91 at 44.5% WR = guaranteed long-term loss. Break-even requires WR>52.4% at current R:R.
100d backtest: WR degrades 4pp per confidence decile above 70%. 80-90% = 40% WR (-$33/trade). Model overconfidence predicts worse outcomes.
